metadata.description: Default community plugin registry seed. Entries here are discoverable by default but remain restricted until the user installs and trusts them.

plugins.name: community/registry-starter
plugins.title: Community Registry Starter
plugins.description: A minimal community plugin that exercises the default registry source and install provenance path.

plugins.name: community/import-smoke-test
plugins.title: Community Import Smoke Test
plugins.description: A portable community plugin used to verify folder, zip, GitHub subpath, and marketplace import flows.

plugins.name: community/hallmark
plugins.title: Hallmark
plugins.description: Anti-AI-slop design skill for greenfield pages, audits, redesigns, and design extraction from URLs or screenshots.

plugins.name: community/frontend-slides
plugins.title: Frontend Slides
plugins.description: Animation-rich, zero-dependency HTML presentations on a fixed 1920x1080 stage that scales to any viewport. Distinctive typography, choreographed staggered reveals, keyboard navigation, and hash routing.

plugins.name: community/huashu-slides
plugins.title: Huashu Slides
plugins.description: Publication-grade single-file HTML decks from the slides workflow of 花叔's huashu-design skill: editorial masthead/kicker/serif-display grammar on a fixed 1920×1080 auto-fit canvas, one terracotta accent, light/dark rhythm, keyboard + hash navigation, anti-AI-slop rules, and an optional editable-PPTX path.

plugins.name: community/fs-creative-voltage
plugins.title: Creative Voltage
plugins.description: Retro-modern single-file HTML decks: electric blue x deep navy split panels, neon yellow badges, halftone dot textures, and script flourishes with Syne + Space Mono on a fixed 1920x1080 stage that scales to any viewport. Based on zarazhangrui/frontend-slides Creative Voltage preset (STYLE_PRESETS.md section 3).

plugins.name: community/fs-editorial-forest
plugins.title: Editorial Forest
plugins.description: Quiet, literary single-file HTML decks: deep forest green #2e4a2a, dusty pink #e89cb1, and warm cream #efe7d4 paper set in Source Serif 4 with JetBrains Mono kickers, on a fixed 1920x1080 stage that scales to any viewport. Mixed light/dark scheme with an 8-slide quarterly-review rhythm. Based on zarazhangrui/beautiful-html-templates editorial-forest.

plugins.name: community/fs-electric-studio
plugins.title: Electric Studio
plugins.description: Bold, clean split-panel HTML decks: white panel over cobalt #4361ee, brand marks in the corners, a dark accent bar on the panel edge, quote typography as the hero element, all-Manrope (800/400), confident restrained spacing. Fixed 1920x1080 stage scaled uniformly to any viewport, zero dependencies. Based on zarazhangrui/frontend-slides electric-studio (STYLE_PRESETS section 2).

plugins.name: community/fs-emerald-editorial
plugins.title: Emerald Editorial
plugins.description: Magazine-cover business decks: a saturated emerald #3CD896 canvas, deep navy #0F1A5C ink, warm paper #F1E9D6 tiles, double-rule masthead ornaments, and Bodoni Moda weight-900 display serif on a fixed 1920x1080 stage with uniform viewport scaling. Mixed emerald/navy scheme, 8-slide editorial rhythm. Based on zarazhangrui/beautiful-html-templates emerald-editorial.

plugins.name: community/fs-notebook-tabs
plugins.title: Notebook Tabs
plugins.description: Editorial 'physical notebook' HTML decks: a cream paper card (#f8f6f1) floating on a dark ground, mint/lavender/pink/sky index tabs on the right fore-edge, binder holes on the left, Bodoni Moda display + DM Sans body, on a fixed 1920x1080 stage that scales to any viewport. Based on zarazhangrui/frontend-slides 'Notebook Tabs' style preset (STYLE_PRESETS.md section 5).

plugins.name: community/hps-academic-paper
plugins.title: Academic Paper
plugins.description: LaTeX-paper deck theme: paper-white #fdfcf8 ground, all-serif type (Latin Modern Roman with Playfair Display fallback), ink-black body, link-blue #1a3a7a underlined citation anchors, italic kickers, zero radius and near-zero shadow, double-rule title page, numbered Figure/Table captions and booktabs three-line tables. Single-file HTML deck with keyboard navigation and hash deep links — for conference talks, thesis defenses, research reviews and journal clubs. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill academic-paper.

plugins.name: community/hps-bauhaus
plugins.title: Bauhaus Primary
plugins.description: Design-history geometric deck: aged canvas #f4efe3, the red/yellow/blue primaries (#e03c27/#f4c430/#1d4eaf), a hard three-band gradient, zero border radius, 2px ink strokes, hard offset shadows, Archivo Black + Space Grotesk. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill bauhaus theme — single-file HTML deck with keyboard navigation and #/N hash deep links.

plugins.name: community/hps-catppuccin-mocha
plugins.title: Catppuccin Mocha
plugins.description: Soothing dark deck theme in the community-favorite Catppuccin Mocha palette: ink-purple #1e1e2e ground, lavender #cdd6f4 text, mauve/blue/pink pastel accents, a mauve→blue→teal gradient, 14px radii and soft shadows — built for developers reading dark screens for long stretches. Single-file HTML scroll-snap deck with keyboard navigation and a signature terminal card for code and CLI content. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill catppuccin-mocha.

plugins.name: community/hps-memphis-pop
plugins.title: Memphis Pop
plugins.description: 80s Memphis pop deck — warm cream canvas tiled edge-to-edge with a pink/teal/yellow confetti-dot pattern, 2.5px black-outlined cards with 5–9px hard offset shadows, hot-pink #ff3d8b lead accent, Archivo Black display type. Single-file HTML, keyboard navigation, zero dependencies. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill memphis-pop. Use for playful product launches, creative pitches, community talks, or any deck that wants loud 1980s Memphis-design energy.

plugins.name: community/hps-retro-tv
plugins.title: Retro TV
plugins.description: 80s/90s picture-tube deck — warm cream canvas with CRT scanlines on every slide (::before repeating-gradient) over a curved-glass tube vignette, amber #e67e14 / brick-red #c73a1f accents, Playfair Display headlines with heavy offset shadows, test-card color bars and antenna/dial inline-SVG decor. Single-file HTML, keyboard navigation, zero dependencies. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill retro-tv. Use for nostalgic product launches, media or entertainment pitches, retrospectives, or any deck that wants warm broadcast-era television energy.

plugins.name: community/hps-true-blueprint
plugins.title: True Blueprint
plugins.description: True-blueprint deck theme: a blueprint-blue #0b3a6f full-bleed field under a 40px white drafting grid, dashed-border translucent cards, white and ice-blue #aee1ff ink lines with amber #ffd27a annotations, every glyph in JetBrains Mono, 2px corners, zero shadows. Drawing-sheet chrome (title block, sheet index, construction-line section numbers, hatched CSS bars, inline-SVG schematics) makes it the natural skin for system-architecture and engineering-design decks. Single self-contained HTML file, zero external JS. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill blueprint theme.

plugins.name: community/hps-vaporwave
plugins.title: Vaporwave
plugins.description: Vaporwave deck theme: a deep-purple-to-magenta sunset sky (#1a0938 → #e85d9c) with a cyan glow ellipse rising from the horizon, pink→purple→cyan gradient-clipped display type, frosted-glass cards with glowing 4px gradient dividers, a scanline sun mark, and Space Grotesk throughout. A E S T H E T I C. Single-file HTML deck with keyboard navigation and #/N hash routing. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill vaporwave (assets/themes/vaporwave.css + templates/deck.html).

plugins.name: community/hps-y2k-chrome
plugins.title: Y2K Chrome
plugins.description: Y2K chrome deck — full-bleed 5-stop silver-metal gradient canvas, white→steel→gunmetal chrome-clipped H1 headlines, 72% white frosted-glass cards with inset top highlights, 26–36px mega-radius corners, candy purple #8a5cff / aqua #3ccfd8 / pink #ff84c4 accents, glossy orb and sparkle decor, Space Grotesk type. Single-file HTML, keyboard navigation, zero dependencies. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill y2k-chrome. Use for product launches, consumer-app pitches, music/fashion/creator decks, or anything that wants millennium-bug-era metallic shine.

plugins.name: community/huashu-annual-letter
plugins.title: Annual Letter
plugins.description: Stripe-annual-letter style single-file HTML decks: cream #FBFAF8 paper with a single Stripe-purple #635BFF accent, serif prose paragraphs at a 65ch publication measure, inline data cards embedded in the running text, and oversized tabular display-number anchor pages — the 'editorial longform' letter genre, prose flow instead of bullets. Based on alchaincyf/huashu-design editorial-longform (design-styles.md 安静派 · Editorial Longform).

plugins.name: community/huashu-bento-insight
plugins.title: Bento Insight Grid
plugins.description: Apple Keynote / QBR-school bento decks: light-grey #F5F5F7 and cream pages, unequal-height rounded cards with 1px hairlines and micro shadows, one insight per card (giant Geist Mono tabular numeral, linear inline-SVG icon, or SVG sparkline), oversized display headlines with hard weight contrast, Inter/Geist typography on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design design-styles.md bento-grid spec (Bento便当格模块网格, neutral school, 95% fidelity), generated from the spec into a full multi-section deck.

plugins.name: community/huashu-golden-circle
plugins.title: Golden Circle Diagram
plugins.description: Sinek/TED-school diagrammatic minimalism decks: warm-white paper, ink, and exactly one gold accent (#E8860C) with its tints; a single geometric master figure — nested concentric WHY/HOW/WHAT circles built from pure border-radius divs — carries every page of the deck through fill, highlight, grey, and outline modes; uppercase Jost labels embedded in the figure, Manrope display headlines, inside-out arrows, zero charts and zero images. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design design-styles.md diagrammatic-minimalism (单图母图概念图解), generated from the spec into a full multi-section deck.

plugins.name: community/huashu-keynote-black
plugins.title: Keynote Black
plugins.description: Jobs-2007 / Lei-Jun-launch-event keynote decks: pure black #000000 stage, pure white type, one word or one giant tabular-nums numeral per screen, exactly one brand accent (Mi orange #FF6900 / Spotify green #1ED760 / Apple blue #2997FF) per deck, massive negative space, faint center spotlight, accent-vs-grey spec-comparison bars, and a price-reveal climax page on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design black-big-number-stage (design-styles.md 大胆派「黑底巨型数字剧场」, generated from spec and wrapped in a full multi-section deck shell).

plugins.name: community/huashu-luxe-whitespace
plugins.title: Luxe Whitespace
plugins.description: Quiet-luxury decks with 70%+ whitespace: a warm off-white #FAFAF8 canvas, Inter 200-600 ultra-thin hierarchy, 120px weight-200 floating numerals with gold decimal points, one warm gold (#D4A574) spent only on hairlines and winning comparison bars, and gradient hairline separators (#E0DCD6) on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design ppt-build, expanded from a single showcase page into a full multi-section deck.

plugins.name: community/huashu-pentagram-grid
plugins.title: Pentagram Info-Architecture
plugins.description: Rational Swiss-grid data decks: black-and-white restraint, Helvetica Neue hierarchy, one red (#E63946), 64px black chrome bars, 5%-opacity grid hairlines, and 260px giant numerals anchoring red/dark/grey comparison bar charts on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design ppt-pentagram, expanded from a single showcase page into a full multi-section deck.

plugins.name: community/huashu-sparkline-arc
plugins.title: Narrative Sparkline
plugins.description: Duarte-style narrative sparkline decks: one oscillating SVG bézier waveform spanning the full 1920×1080 canvas, brand-orange (#FF6B2C) turning-point annotations, greyed ghost comparison lines, stroke-dashoffset progressive reveal, mono hairline chrome, Inter + Geist Mono. Built for change narratives, before/after contrasts, and data story arcs. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design narrative-sparkline (references/design-styles.md · 中性派 · Sparkline叙事波形), generated from spec into a full multi-section deck.

plugins.name: community/huashu-takram-soft-tech
plugins.title: Takram Soft Tech
plugins.description: Soft Eastern-philosophy tech decks: warm rice-paper canvas (#F5F0EB), sage green #6B8F71 + one gold #D4A574 + warm grays, Noto Serif SC display headings mixed with Inter labels, rounded translucent data cards, and SVG data visualization treated as an art piece — three-series overlaid radar charts on hand-drawn dashed grids with Fig. NN plate annotations, on a fixed 1920×1080 canvas. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design ppt-takram, expanded from a single showcase page into a full multi-section deck.

plugins.name: community/ve-midnight-editorial
plugins.title: Midnight Editorial
plugins.description: Cinematic editorial dark deck theme: deep navy #0f1729 pages with warm gold #d4a73a accents, Instrument Serif 120px dramatic display dropping straight to 14px JetBrains Mono labels, a gold radial accent glow per slide, gold SVG corner marks and ghost section numerals, staggered cinematic reveal transitions, and a locked cream/gold light mode toggled by the SlideEngine (T key). Pure CSS/SVG diagrams and charts, keyboard-first single-file HTML, zero external JS. Based on https://github.com/nicobailon/visual-explainer midnight-editorial (templates/slide-deck.html), locked as a single-aesthetic deck plugin. Use for engineering reviews, product keynotes and editorial launches that should feel like a midnight issue of a serious journal.

plugins.name: community/ve-terminal-mono
plugins.title: Terminal Mono
plugins.description: Developer-native dark deck theme: near-black #0a0e14 ground, Geist Mono everywhere with large weight-400 titles (never bold display), Dracula-green #50fa7b accent, faint dot-grid texture, and low-opacity green hairlines. Zero skeuomorphism, zero effects - pure typographic discipline. Scroll-snap single-file HTML with SlideEngine navigation, hash routing, and automatic light mode (#f4f6f8 / #0d7a3e) via prefers-color-scheme. Based on nicobailon/visual-explainer terminal-mono.
